primary_focus: aria-tree pattern with keyboard navigation, recursive component rendering, discriminated union for tree nodes

accessibility_signals.correct: The tree container has role='tree'. Each item has role='treeitem'. Directories have aria-expanded. Items have aria-selected for the focused/selected item. Nesting uses role='group' on child lists.
accessibility_signals.anti_pattern_tier1: No ARIA roles at all — just div/span with onClick and onKeyDown. Screen readers cannot parse the tree structure.
accessibility_signals.anti_pattern_tier2: Partial ARIA — role='tree' on the container but missing aria-expanded, aria-selected, or role='group' on nested lists. Keyboard works but the structure isn't communicated to assistive technology.

accessibility_signals.trigger: Requirement 8: only one item has focus at a time
accessibility_signals.correct: Only the focused treeitem has tabindex='0'; all others have tabindex='-1'. Arrow keys move focus by updating which item has tabindex='0' and calling .focus(). This is the WAI-ARIA recommended pattern for tree views.
accessibility_signals.anti_pattern: All items have tabindex='0' (user must Tab through every item) or no tabindex at all (tree items are not focusable)

accessibility_signals.trigger: Requirement 7: Home goes to first item, End goes to last visible item
accessibility_signals.anti_pattern: Only arrow keys implemented, Home/End ignored

component_design_signals.correct: A single TreeNode (or TreeItem) component that renders itself recursively for directories. Directories render their children as a list of TreeNode components.
component_design_signals.anti_pattern: Flattening the tree into a list and using indentation to simulate nesting — loses the semantic tree structure

component_design_signals.signal: Separation of tree logic from rendering
component_design_signals.correct: A custom hook (e.g., useTreeNavigation) that manages expanded state, focused item, and keyboard navigation. The component handles rendering, the hook handles behavior.
component_design_signals.anti_pattern: All logic (expand/collapse, keyboard nav, focus management) inline in the render component

typescript_signals.signal: Discriminated union narrowing for FileNode vs DirectoryNode
typescript_signals.correct: switch (node.type) or if (node.type === 'directory') to narrow the union and access type-specific fields (children for directories, content/size for files)
typescript_signals.anti_pattern: Optional chaining everywhere: node.children?.map(...) without narrowing

performance_signals.signal: Memoized tree nodes to prevent re-rendering entire tree on selection change
performance_signals.correct: React.memo on TreeNode component so that expanding/collapsing or selecting a file doesn't re-render the entire tree — only the affected subtree
performance_signals.anti_pattern: Entire tree re-renders on every state change

performance_signals.correct: useMemo on the filtered tree, keyed on search text
performance_signals.anti_pattern: Re-filtering the entire tree on every render

derived_values_that_must_not_be_state.name: filteredTree
derived_values_that_must_not_be_state.correct: Computed via useMemo from FILE_TREE and search text
derived_values_that_must_not_be_state.anti_pattern: Stored as useState and synced via useEffect

derived_values_that_must_not_be_state.name: visibleItems (for keyboard navigation)
derived_values_that_must_not_be_state.trigger: Requirement 7: arrow keys navigate visible items
derived_values_that_must_not_be_state.correct: Derived from the tree + expanded state during render or in the keyboard handler

legitimate_effect_uses.expected_pattern: useEffect or ref callback to call .focus() when the focused item changes

expected_components: TreeNode / TreeItem (recursive, renders file or directory)
